calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name - of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: R. Edwards/M. Chin, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Liliana Bermudez, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for Minor: Jose Isaac Sandoval, was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: ISAAC SANDOVAL.

Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-21-2004 Off Calendar
